content_body:
Culture and the Arts thrive in Blue Ridge, where amazing talent abounds. Whether a visitor or a resident, there is always something going on by way of dramas, comedies, and musical productions produced by the Blue Ridge Community Theater. Even kids can join the act with the Sunny D Children's Theater. 2-week workshops in the summer (June) afford kids the opportunity of a lifetime to learn about acting and actually perform in a production.

The Blue Ridge Community Theater's beautiful playhouse is located in the renovated Hampton Square building on 11 Mountain Street in Historic Downtown Blue Ridge.
title: Blue Ridge Community Theatre
